CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION,A STATE CHARTERED CREDIT UNION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIEVES, VICTOR AN INDIVIDUAL POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: *SEE TEXT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $14,095.42 DAMAGES, $1,750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $583.10 COSTS, $771.68 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,200.20, PROPERTY VALUE: $13,700.00. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO AN ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY JUDGMENT & FOR POSSESSION OF PERSONALY PROPERTY ALLOWING PLAINTIFF TO POSSESS & REPOSSESS THE UNIT. (SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH).
